text: Oh hey! Welcome to the stream, you're just in time because things are about to get chaotic and I am absolutely here for it.
Okay okay okay, the charts are looking absolutely spicy right now and I need everyone to act accordingly.
Not gonna lie, I just had the craziest alpha download and I literally cannot keep this to myself.
Gerald thinks he can out-trade me. Gerald. Please. That man couldn't trade his way out of a paper bag.
It's giving main character energy today and honestly? We deserve this. We've been through so much.
Hear me out, hear me out. What if we just... bought more? Revolutionary strategy, I know.
The vibes in here are absolutely immaculate right now. We're so back. We were never gone actually.
I've been staring at this chart for like three hours and honestly? I think I've achieved some form of financial enlightenment.
This is not financial advice. This is financial prophecy. There is a very important difference.
